n: Book 14, Chapter 6: The Fate of Laerdan

steps.t: Elrond is in his library at the Last Homely House in Rivendell. Elrond wishes to speak with you regarding what he discovered in Laerdan's journal.
Elrond is in his library at the Last Homely House in Rivendell. You discussed the fate of Laerdan with Elrond, coming to a dire conclusion.
